## Item name proposal

Use lowercase snake_case (example: `deer_pelt`).

## Item details

- Label:
- Description:
- Suggested weight:
- Stackable (true/false):

## Image details

- Do you have an icon ready? (yes/no)
- Expected filename:

## Use case

Explain how this item is used in gameplay/economy.
